HGSS.653.0001:
Ethan: I completely forgot!
We should trade phone numbers!
HGSS.653.0002:
Ethan: Call me anytime! We can trade
Pokémon information!
HGSS.653.0003:
What’s up, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Even though you’re nearby, the phone
makes you seem far away. Maybe if you\r
shout, then you’ll seem closer!
HGSS.653.0007:
Hello? This is Ethan...
Good morning!\f
HGSS.653.0008:
Hello? This is Ethan...
How are you?\f
HGSS.653.0009:
Hello? This is Ethan...
Good evening!\f
HGSS.653.0010:
You know, my dad was tackled by a
Pokémon and now his lower back hurts.\f
It seems that it thought they were only
playing around...\f
Well, it wasn’t anything big, so that’s
good to hear.\f
Well, I’ll talk to you later!
HGSS.653.0011:
Whenever MARILL gets annoyed, it hops
in the water.\f
Recently it jumped into the bath, and
there was water all over the place!\f
Well, I’ll talk to you more about
Pokémon later!
HGSS.653.0012:
It’s so helpful the Pokémon Center
will heal your Pokémon for you for free.\f
The first thing I do every time I arrive
in a town is look for the nearest\r
Pokémon Center.\f
Keep up the great work, [0103,0000,0000]!
HGSS.653.0013:
I took a BULBASAUR for a walk on
Route 1 the other day!\f
It really seemed like it was enjoying it!
HGSS.653.0014:
You know, I wonder what it’d be like
taking a CHARMANDER for a stroll along\r
Route 2...\f
I heard that CHARMANDER really like
that area.
HGSS.653.0015:
You know, I’ve heard that people who
take a SQUIRTLE for a walk on Route 3\r
tend to fall down!
HGSS.653.0016:
Speaking of... Mt. Moon is on Route 4,
isn’t it?\f
If I recall correctly, CLEFAIRY really
like Mt. Moon!
HGSS.653.0017:
You know there’s a Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City? The Pokémon I had with me\r
were all really surprised!
HGSS.653.0018:
You know, I went to the port in
Vermilion City.\r
All of my Pokémon had so much fun riding\r
on the S.S. Aqua!
HGSS.653.0019:
You know, I took a PORYGON for a walk in
Celadon City...and I heard this weird,\r
“Jijiji...” sound.\r
It was like it was trying to speak!
HGSS.653.0020:
You know how there’s a guy named
Mr. Psychic in Saffron City?\f
I wonder what would happen if you took
Psychic-type Pokémon there?
HGSS.653.0021:
Hey, have you been to the Rock Tunnel
yet?\f
If you take an ONIX with you there,
it becomes so happy!
HGSS.653.0022:
Hey, you know if you ever get the
chance to go to the Power Plant, you\r
should take a PIKACHU with you.\f
It’s really fun!
HGSS.653.0023:
Hey, you know that DIGLETT’s Cave near
Route 11?\f
Speaking of the Pokémon that you
should take with you there...\r
Well, I probably don’t need to tell you!
HGSS.653.0024:
Where are you right now?
Route 12?\f
I see... Oh!
You should visit the Pokémon House in\r
Lavender Town!
HGSS.653.0025:
Where are you now?
Route 13?\f
Isn’t that where the road becomes a
bit of a maze?\f
That might be why the Pokémon in that
area always seem a bit perplexed.
HGSS.653.0026:
So, you’re around Route 14 right now,
aren’t you?\f
There’s a huge windmill over in that
area, so it’s very beautiful, isn’t it?
HGSS.653.0027:
Where are you now? Route 15?\f
How about stopping by the Warden of
the Pal Park’s house in Fuchsia?\f
There’re so many AIPOM there.
It’s fun!
HGSS.653.0028:
You’re at Route 16 right now?
So, you’re pretty close to Cycling Road\r
then, aren’t you?\f
It’s so much fun running with your
Pokémon...but of course that’d be\r
a little dangerous there!
HGSS.653.0029:
You’re at Route 17 right now?
So that means...\r
you’re on the Cycling Road!\f
It’s so much fun running with your
Pokémon...but of course, that’d be\r
a little dangerous there!
HGSS.653.0030:
You’re at Route 18 right now?
So, you’re pretty close to Cycling Road\r
then, aren’t you?\f
It’s so much fun running with your
Pokémon...but of course, that’d be\r
a little dangerous there!
HGSS.653.0031:
You know, whenever I get over by
Route 19, I always want to go play in\r
the water with my Pokémon, don’t you?\r
I think it’d be so much fun...
HGSS.653.0032:
Come to think of it...when you’re near
water with Fire-type Pokémon, they\r
seem to really not enjoy it...\r
I understand how they feel!
HGSS.653.0033:
Sitting on Route 21 with your Pokémon,
watching the sunset over the beach...\r
What do you think about that?\r
It seems weird to me, ’cause that’s\r
more of a romantic couple thing to do!
HGSS.653.0034:
You know, Route 22 is the road to the
Pokémon League, so I bet it makes your\r
Pokémon feel pretty nervous, huh?
HGSS.653.0035:
You know, the bridge on Route 24 is
called the “Nugget Bridge.”\f
It’s not an official name, but it seems
like a lot of people call it that.\f
The sun’s light reflects off the water
there, so it’s kind of dazzling...
HGSS.653.0036:
You know, I think most Pokémon have
never seen their own face.\f
So if you take them to a puddle on
Route 25 and let them see their\r
reflection, I wonder what\r
they’ll think...
HGSS.653.0037:
You know, Route 26 is so full of natural
beauty, I bet it’s a really wonderful\r
place for Pokémon.\f
But it’s also a road leading to the
Pokémon League, so it probably makes\r
them anxious, too.
HGSS.653.0038:
You know, I’ve heard that sometimes
Pokémon will find things along Route 27.\f
It’s probably a good idea to take along
the Pokémon you have the closest\r
friendship with.
HGSS.653.0039:
Route 28, that’s the one going to
Mt. Silver, isn’t it?\f
I’m sure that must make your Pokémon
worry a little bit, too.
HGSS.653.0040:
Oh, that’s right. How is it to take
CHIKORITA with you to Route 29?\f
I bet it will look like it’s having
great fun!
HGSS.653.0041:
Oh, that’s right. How is it to take
TOTODILE with you to Route 30?\f
I bet it will look like it’s having
great fun!
HGSS.653.0042:
You know, I bet it would be really
interesting to take CYNDAQUIL with you\r
to Route 31!\f
I heard that CYNDAQUIL really like
that area!
HGSS.653.0043:
Hey, you can find UNOWN in the
Ruins of Alph, right? I wonder what\r
would happen if you already had one and\r
took it for a walk through the ruins?
HGSS.653.0044:
You know, it’s always raining on
Route 33. It never stops!\f
I get kind of down on rainy days, but I
know there’s Pokémon out there that\r
love the rain!\f
...Like TOTODILE!
HGSS.653.0045:
You know, FARFETCH’D are known to have
a strange fascination with Ilex Forest.\r
When they’re there, it’s like they\r
don’t even hear you.\f
I think I might take a FARFETCH’D there
to see for myself sometime.
HGSS.653.0046:
Hey, did you know?
When Pokémon go to the Pokéathlon,\r
they get really excited and fired up!\f
I think I’ll take my Pokémon over there
soon, too!
HGSS.653.0047:
Did you know that something really
interesting happens if you take a\r
SUDOWOODO to Route 36?\f
What kind of interesting?
Well, you’ll just have to try it\r
and see!
HGSS.653.0048:
Hey, did you meet the twins over on
Route 37?\f
They’re so cute, and their Pokémon are
very popular.
HGSS.653.0049:
I took a TAUROS over to Moomoo Farm
recently. There was such an uproar,\r
I didn’t know what to do!
HGSS.653.0050:
You know, you should take a MILTANK
with you over to Route 39.\f
It will find so many friends over there.
It’ll be great fun!
HGSS.653.0051:
You should take a POLIWAG over to
Route 40 sometime and see what\r
happens!\f
You’ll see something interesting.
That’s for sure!
HGSS.653.0052:
You know, Water-type Pokémon really
love the sea...\f
Watching your Pokémon having fun and
being really happy is enough to make\r
you feel happy, too!
HGSS.653.0053:
Is everything all right?
You know, Route 42 is a mountain road.\r
If you take a Rock-type Pokémon\r
through there, I bet they’d enjoy it.
HGSS.653.0054:
You know, if you’d like to see MAGIKARP
get really excited, you should take it\r
over to the Lake of Rage and see\r
what happens!
HGSS.653.0055:
Right now you’re...on Route 44!\f
Was I right? All right!\f
It’s pretty cold around there, right?
I feel bad for the Pokémon that are\r
sensitive to cold...\f
But I bet Ice-type Pokémon feel
right at home!
HGSS.653.0056:
You know, there’s that river that
meanders around near Route 45.\r
It’s a fun route to take.\f
I went there recently, and my Pokémon
were really interested in the river.\r
They kept looking out at it.
HGSS.653.0057:
Hey, you know how there’s so much tall
grass on Route 46?\r
Well, the Pokémon you have with you\r
also become worried about when a wild\r
Pokémon will come leaping out!
HGSS.653.0058:
You know, Route 47 has such a
beautiful, natural view!\f
...That said, have you heard of DITTO?\f
DITTO get really energetic around
Route 47. It’s kind of strange...
HGSS.653.0059:
Hey...
You know how there’s that really tall\r
cliff near Route 48?\f
When you’re walking around there, the
Pokémon with you all get pretty\r
scared, too...\f
Me?
Me, I’m...always shaking with fear!
HGSS.653.0060:
Where are you now?
Pallet Town... That means you’re over\r
by Professor Oak’s place!\f
The professor really likes Pokémon.\f
You should take a Pokémon over to
Professor Oak’s Laboratory sometime!
HGSS.653.0061:
Where are you now? Viridian City? That’s
where the Trainer House is, right?\f
When Pokémon go over there, they get
really fired up, you know!
HGSS.653.0062:
So, where are you now? Viridian City?
Oh, you’re in Pewter City!\f
In Pewter there’s a museum, right?\f
You can take Pokémon over to the
museum with you for a fun field trip!
HGSS.653.0063:
So, where are you now?
Cerulean City, you say?\f
So...did you meet the Cerulean Gym
Leader, Misty?\f
Oh, nothing. Just wondering.
HGSS.653.0064:
Where are you now?
Lavender Town?\r
You’ve gone pretty far, huh?\f
In that town, there’s a place called
the House of Memories where they have\r
Pokémon graves, you know.\f
As a Trainer, you should visit at least
once out of respect.
HGSS.653.0065:
Where are you now? Vermilion City?\f
That’s where the Pokémon Fan Club is if
I recall correctly!\f
If you’ve got a BAYLEEF, you should
take it over there to them and say hi!
HGSS.653.0066:
So, where are you now?
Celadon City? I see...\f
That reminds me. I once took a TANGELA
with me to Celadon. It was so happy...\r
and something happened!\f
You should try it, too, and see what
happens!
HGSS.653.0067:
So, where are you now? Fuchsia City?
You just pop up in the strangest\r
places, don’t you?\f
That reminds me. I heard that if you
take a TAUROS to Fuchsia, they get\r
really agitated!\f
I wonder why... I don’t really get it.
But I bet it would be interesting to try\r
it and see what happens!
HGSS.653.0068:
So, where’re you now? Cinnabar?
You’ve gone pretty far, haven’t you?\f
Standing with your Pokémon, looking
out to sea while standing in a town\r
that was buried in lava...\f
That seems almost like the final scene
from a movie or something!
HGSS.653.0069:
You know, when a friend of mine went to
the Indigo Plateau, the Pokémon with\r
my friend got so excited that they were\r
making loud snorting noises!
HGSS.653.0070:
So, where are you now?
Oh, you’re in Saffron City?\f
That’s where the Copycat’s house
is, right?\f
You should take a MIME JR. over there
and see what happens.\f
I bet it’s something interesting!
HGSS.653.0071:
Where are you now?
What are you doing in New Bark Town?\f
Did you go back home?
You should show off your Pokémon to\r
your mom. I bet she’d be happy!
HGSS.653.0072:
Where are you? Cherrygrove City?
Doesn’t Cherrygrove have that\r
wonderful winding path?\f
It’s so much fun to run with your
Pokémon along the beach and listen to\r
the sound of the waves!
HGSS.653.0073:
Where are you? Violet City?
If you’re in Violet, that means...\r
You’re near Sprout Tower!\f
You should take a BELLSPROUT with you
when you go there! I heard they dance!\f
I wonder if it’s true...
Will you try it, and find out for me?
HGSS.653.0074:
So, whereabouts are you now?\f
You’re in...Cianwood!\f
No? You’re in Azalea Town?\f
Azalea’s Gym is really awesome,
isn’t it?\r
Did you try riding on the SPINARAK yet?\f
I wonder what would happen if you took
a real SPINARAK to that Gym?\f
I think that would be interesting!
HGSS.653.0075:
So, where are you now?\f
Let me guess...Cianwood!\f
Yes! I’m right!
If you’re in Cianwood, you should try\r
taking a KRABBY around with you.\f
What’s it like? Well, you should try it
and see for yourself!
HGSS.653.0076:
So, where are you now?
Goldenrod City?\f
You know, if you look carefully at that
Gym, it’s in the shape of a CLEFAIRY.\f
It’s true!
You should take a CLEFAIRY there!\f
I bet that whatever happens, it will be
incredibly cute!
HGSS.653.0077:
You know, when you mention Olivine City,
all I think of is the Port Lighthouse!\f
You should take an AMPHAROS there
and see what happens!\r
I bet it will be bright...
HGSS.653.0078:
So, where are you now?
You’re in Ecruteak City?\f
You should take a PICHU with you over
to the Ecruteak Dance Theater!\f
It’s such a wonderful place. Whenever
I’m there, I feel like dancing!
HGSS.653.0079:
That reminds me...have you caught any
Ice-type Pokémon yet?\f
Ice-type Pokémon really love playing on
the ice. They look like they’re having\r
so much fun!
HGSS.653.0080:
You know, if you go to the Lake of Rage,
you can see just how energetic\r
MAGIKARP can be!\f
If you’ve got a MAGIKARP, you should
take it there and see for yourself!
HGSS.653.0081:
You know, there’s someone in
Blackthorn City who can make Pokémon\r
forget moves they’ve learned. If you\r
do that, they don’t just forget their\r
moves, they almost forget they’re\r
holding an item, too.\f
Well, they don’t actually forget
they’re holding an item, so you\r
shouldn’t worry about it!
HGSS.653.0082:
You know, I haven’t been to Mt. Silver.\f
I bet it’s a place that makes even
Pokémon pretty nervous.
HGSS.653.0083:
So, where are you now?
Oh, you’re at the National Park!\r
I really like that Park, too.\f
It might just be my imagination, but I
think the Bug-type Pokémon do, too!
HGSS.653.0084:
So, you’re at the Ruins of Alph now?\f
That’s where you can find UNOWN, right?
Did you catch any yet?\f
You know, if you have an UNOWN, you
should take it there.
HGSS.653.0085:
So, where are you now?
The Safari Zone?\f
It’s a bit far to walk to get there, but
it’s definitely worth it. There’re so\r
many different Pokémon there!
HGSS.653.0086:
You know, if you ever get the chance to
go to Route 1, take a BULBASAUR\r
along with you!\f
It will have such a fun time!
HGSS.653.0087:
You know, if you’re headed to Route 2,
you should take a CHARMANDER along\r
with you...\f
I heard that CHARMANDER really like
that area.
HGSS.653.0088:
Hey, have you been to Route 3 yet?\f
I heard that people who take a
SQUIRTLE there tend to fall!
HGSS.653.0089:
You know, Mt. Moon is on Route 4.\f
I heard that CLEFAIRY really like
Mt. Moon!
HGSS.653.0090:
You know, there’s a Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City?\f
It’s a place just for battles. All the
Pokémon I had with me were surprised!
HGSS.653.0091:
You know, I went to the port in
Vermilion City.\r
All of my Pokémon had so much fun riding\r
on the S.S. Aqua!
HGSS.653.0092:
Have you been to Celadon City?\f
You know, I took a PORYGON for a walk in
Celadon City...and I heard this weird,\r
“Jijiji...” sound.\r
It was like it was trying to speak!
HGSS.653.0093:
You know how there’s a guy named
Mr. Psychic in Saffron City?\f
I wonder what would happen if you took
Psychic-type Pokémon there?
HGSS.653.0094:
Hey, if you ever get the chance to go
to Rock Tunnel, you should take an\r
ONIX with you.\f
If you take an ONIX with you there,
it becomes so happy!
HGSS.653.0095:
Hey, did you go to the Power Plant yet?\f
You should take a PIKACHU with you to
the Power Plant. It’s so much fun!
HGSS.653.0096:
Have you been to DIGLETT’s Cave yet?\f
Speaking of the Pokémon that you
should take with you there...\r
Well, I probably don’t need to\r
tell you!
HGSS.653.0097:
There’s a Pokémon House in
Lavender Town. You should take your\r
Pokémon there. I think it would\r
enjoy it.
HGSS.653.0098:
Hey, Route 13 is the one that’s a bit
of a maze, isn’t it?\f
That may be why the Pokémon in that
area always seem a bit perplexed.
HGSS.653.0099:
Hey, if you haven’t been to Route 14
yet, you absolutely have to go over\r
there and see it!\f
There’s a huge windmill over in that
area. It’s just so very astonishing...
HGSS.653.0100:
Have you been to the Pal Park Warden’s
house in Fuchsia yet?\f
There’re so many AIPOM there.
It’s amazing!
HGSS.653.0101:
Have you had the chance to take
the Cycling Road yet?\f
It’s so much fun running with your
Pokémon...but of course that’d be a\r
little dangerous there!
HGSS.653.0102:
Have you had the chance to take
the Cycling Road yet?\f
It’s so much fun running with your
Pokémon...but of course that’d be a\r
little dangerous there!
HGSS.653.0103:
Have you had the chance to take
the Cycling Road yet?\f
It’s so much fun running with your
Pokémon...but of course that’d be a\r
little dangerous there!
HGSS.653.0104:
It’s so much fun to play with Pokémon
along the water’s edge!\f
If I recall correctly, you can see the
sea from Route 19...
HGSS.653.0105:
Come to think of it...when you’re near
water with Fire-type Pokémon, they\r
seem to really not enjoy it...\r
I understand how they feel!
HGSS.653.0106:
You know, if you’re headed to Route 21,
I’ve got a suggestion for you.\f
You could sit with your Pokémon,
watching the sunset over the beach...\f
What do you think...? It’s more of a
romantic couple’s thing isn’t it!
HGSS.653.0107:
Route 22 is the road to the Pokémon
League, isn’t it?\f
I bet it makes your Pokémon feel pretty
nervous, huh?
HGSS.653.0108:
You know, there’s a really big bridge
on Route 24 called the\r
“Nugget Bridge.”\f
It’s not an official name, but it seems
like a lot of people call it that.\f
The sun’s light reflects off the water
there, so it’s kind of dazzling...
HGSS.653.0109:
Hey, you know how there’s that big
puddle on Route 25? I think most\r
Pokémon have never seen their\r
own face.\f
I wonder what they would think if they
saw their reflection in that puddle...
HGSS.653.0110:
You know, Route 26 is so full of natural
beauty. I bet that it’s a really\r
wonderful place for Pokémon.\f
But it’s also a road leading to the
Pokémon League, so it probably makes\r
them nervous, too.
HGSS.653.0111:
You know, I’ve heard that sometimes
Pokémon will find things along Route 27.\f
It’s probably a good idea to take along
the Pokémon you have the closest\r
friendship with.
HGSS.653.0112:
Route 28, that’s the one going to
Mt. Silver, right?\f
Your Pokémon probably put on a good
show of being brave, but I bet they\r
worry a little bit, too...
HGSS.653.0113:
What do you think about taking
CHIKORITA with you to Route 29?\f
I bet it will look like it’s having
great fun!
HGSS.653.0114:
What do you think about taking
TOTODILE with you to Route 30?\f
I bet it will look like it’s having
great fun!
HGSS.653.0115:
What do you think about taking
CYNDAQUIL with you to Route 31?\f
I bet it will look like it’s having
great fun!
HGSS.653.0116:
I heard from someone that you can find
a Pokémon called UNOWN in the\r
Ruins of Alph.\f
So, if that’s true...I wonder if that
would change if you already had an\r
UNOWN and you took them with you to\r
the Ruins of Alph...
HGSS.653.0117:
You know, it’s always raining on
Route 33. It never stops!\f
I get kind of down on rainy days, but I
know there’s Pokémon out there that\r
love the rain!\f
...Like TOTODILE!
HGSS.653.0118:
You know, FARFETCH’D are known to have
a strange fascination with Ilex Forest.\r
When they’re there, it’s like they\r
don’t even hear you.\f
I think I might take a FARFETCH’D there
to see for myself sometime.
HGSS.653.0119:
Hey, have you heard of the Pokéathlon?
When Pokémon go to the Pokéathlon,\r
they get so excited!\f
I think I’ll take my Pokémon there
sometime, too!
HGSS.653.0120:
Did you know that something really
interesting happens if you take a\r
SUDOWOODO to Route 36?\f
What kind of interesting?
Well, you’ll just have to try it\r
and see!
HGSS.653.0121:
Hey, did you meet the twins over on
Route 37?\f
They’re so cute, and their Pokémon are
very popular.
HGSS.653.0122:
I took a TAUROS over to Moomoo Farm
on Route 39 recently. There was such\r
an uproar, I didn’t know what to do!
HGSS.653.0123:
You know, if you’re going over to
Route 39, you should take a MILTANK\r
along with you.\f
It will find so many friends over there,
it’ll be great fun!
HGSS.653.0124:
You know, if you’re headed over to
Route 40, you should take a POLIWAG\r
with you and see what happens!\f
You’ll see something interesting.
That’s for sure!
HGSS.653.0125:
I recently went over to Route 41 to
have fun. You know, Water-type Pokémon\r
really love the sea...\f
Watching your Pokémon have fun and
be happy is enough to make\r
you happy, too!
HGSS.653.0126:
You know, Route 42 is a mountain road.
If you take a Rock-type Pokémon\r
through there, I bet they’d enjoy it.
HGSS.653.0127:
You know, if you’d like to see MAGIKARP
get really excited, you should take it\r
over to the Lake of Rage and see\r
what happens!
HGSS.653.0128:
Speaking of Route 44, it’s such a cold
place. I feel bad for the Pokémon that\r
are sensitive to cold...\f
But I bet that Ice-type Pokémon feel
right at home!
HGSS.653.0129:
You know, there’s that river that
meanders around near Route 45.\r
It’s a fun route to take.\f
I went there recently, and my Pokémon
were really interested in the river.\r
They kept looking out at it.
HGSS.653.0130:
Hey, you know how there’s so much tall
grass on Route 46?\r
Well, the Pokémon you have with you\r
also become worried about when a wild\r
Pokémon will come leaping out!
HGSS.653.0131:
Have you been to Route 47?
It has such a beautiful, natural view!\f
...That said, have you heard of DITTO?\f
DITTO get really energetic around
Route 47. It’s kind of strange...
HGSS.653.0132:
You know how there’s that really tall
cliff near Route 47?\f
When you’re walking around there, the
Pokémon with you all get pretty\r
scared, too...\f
Me?
Me, I’m...always shaking with fear!
HGSS.653.0133:
Pallet Town’s Professor Oak really
likes Pokémon.\f
You should take a Pokémon over to
Professor Oak’s Laboratory sometime!
HGSS.653.0134:
There’s a Trainer House in Viridian City.
Did you know?\f
When Pokémon go over there, they get
really fired up, you know!
HGSS.653.0135:
In Pewter City there’s a museum, right?\f
You can take Pokémon over to the
museum with you for a fun field trip!
HGSS.653.0136:
So...did you meet the Cerulean City Gym
Leader, Misty?\f
Oh, nothing. Just wondering.
HGSS.653.0137:
In Lavender Town, there’s a place
called the House of Memories where\r
they have Pokémon graves, you know.\f
As a Trainer, you should visit at least
once out of respect.
HGSS.653.0138:
Vermilion City’s where the Pokémon Fan
Club is if I recall correctly!\f
If you’ve got a BAYLEEF, you should
take it over there to them and say hi!
HGSS.653.0139:
You know, I once took a TANGELA with me
to Celadon City Gym. It was so happy,\r
and something happened!\f
You should try it, too, and see what
happens!
HGSS.653.0140:
You know, I heard that if you take a
TAUROS to Fuchsia, they get\r
really agitated!\f
I wonder why... I don’t really get it.
But I bet it would be interesting to try\r
it and see what happens!
HGSS.653.0141:
If you’re in Cinnabar with your
Pokémon, looking out to sea while\r
standing in a town that was buried\r
in lava...\f
That seems almost like the final scene
from a movie or something!
HGSS.653.0142:
You know, the Indigo Plateau is pretty
close to the Pokémon League. Your\r
Pokémon will likely yell out to psych\r
themselves up!
HGSS.653.0143:
Saffron City is where the Copycat’s
house is, right?\f
You should take a MIME JR. over there
and see what happens.\f
I bet it’s something interesting!
HGSS.653.0144:
If you go back home to New Bark Town,
you should show off your Pokémon to\r
your mom. I bet she’d be happy!
HGSS.653.0145:
I really like that wonderful winding
path in Cherrygrove City.\f
It’s so much fun to run with your
Pokémon along the beach and listen to\r
the sound of the waves!
HGSS.653.0146:
If you’re in Violet City, that means
you’re near Sprout Tower!\f
You should take a BELLSPROUT with you
when you go there! I heard they dance!\f
I wonder if it’s true...
Will you try it and find out for me?
HGSS.653.0147:
Azalea Town’s Gym is really awesome,
don’t you think?\f
Did you try riding the SPINARAK yet?\f
I wonder what would happen if you took
a real SPINARAK to that Gym?\f
I think it’d be interesting!
HGSS.653.0148:
If you’re going to Cianwood, you should
try taking a KRABBY with you.\f
What’s it like? Well, you should try it
and see for yourself!
HGSS.653.0149:
You know, if you look carefully at the
Goldenrod City Gym, it’s in the shape of\r
a CLEFAIRY?\f
It’s true!
You should take a CLEFAIRY there!\f
I bet that whatever happens, it will be
incredibly cute!
HGSS.653.0150:
When you mention Olivine City, all I
think of is the Port Lighthouse!\f
You should take an AMPHAROS there
and see what happens!\r
I bet it will be bright...
HGSS.653.0151:
If you have a PICHU, you should take
it with you over to the Ecruteak Dance\r
Theater!\f
It’s such a wonderful place. Whenever
I’m there, I feel like dancing!
HGSS.653.0152:
That reminds me...have you caught any
Ice-type Pokémon yet?\f
Ice-type Pokémon really love playing on
the ice. They look like they’re having\r
so much fun!
HGSS.653.0153:
You know, if you go to the Lake of Rage,
you can see just how energetic\r
MAGIKARP can be!
HGSS.653.0154:
There’s someone in Blackthorn City who
can make Pokémon forget moves they’ve\r
learned. But if you do that, they don’t\r
just forget their moves, they forget\r
they were holding an item, too.\f
Well, that all sounds pretty unlikely,
so you shouldn’t worry about it!
HGSS.653.0155:
Have you heard of a place called
Mt. Silver?\f
I haven’t been there yet.\f
I bet it’s a place that makes even
Pokémon pretty nervous.
HGSS.653.0156:
Did you know that there’s a huge
Bug-Catching Contest in the\r
National Park?\f
That’s why there’re so many Bug-type
Pokémon there. If you took your\r
Bug-type Pokémon there too, I bet\r
they’d really enjoy it!
HGSS.653.0157:
I heard from someone that you can find
a Pokémon called UNOWN in the\r
Ruins of Alph.\f
So, if that’s true...I wonder if that
would change if you already had an\r
UNOWN and you took it with you to\r
the Ruins of Alph...
HGSS.653.0158:
It’s a bit far to walk to get to the
Safari Zone, but it’s definitely worth\r
it. There’re so many different\r
Pokémon there!
